sglang.title: [AMD]: hot-patch transformers dynamic_module_utils symlink bug
sglang.author: Lzy17
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
transformers==5.12.1 introduced dynamic_module_utils._compute_local_source_files_hash, which calls Path(...).resolve() on custom-code module files. In a normal HuggingFace cache the snapshot files (models--org--name/snapshots/<hash>/x.py) are relative symlinks into ../../blobs/<blob>. Res

sglang.title: [diffusion] feat: performance_mode=speed enables torch.compile by default
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
--performance-mode speed configures GPU-resident execution (offloads off, FSDP/CFG-parallel policy) but leaves torch.compile off unless the user also passes --enable-torch-compile. In practice that split is easy to miss: auditing our cross-framework benchmark found several speed-intent de

sglang.title: [diffusion][cache-dit] add cache-dit support for Ideogram 4
sglang.author: Jzz1943
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add Cache-DiT support for Ideogram 4 in SGLang.
Ideogram 4 uses two DiT modules: a conditional transformer and an unconditional transformer. This PR enables optional Cache-DiT acceleration for both transformers through the existing SGLANG_CACHE_DIT_ENABLED flag. The default path is unchan

On GLM-5.2 (DSA) with EAGLE speculative decoding, the profiler shows ~22 CUDA
streams during target verify instead of the expected 2. This appeared after the
DSA indexer Q/K fusion landed.
The root cause is the issue order of the dual-stream section in the fused
indexer path Indexer._fuse

sglang.title: [trtllm_mha] Fuse cuda-graph metadata rebuild into one triton kernel
sglang.author: pranjalssh
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The TRTLLM MHA backend's CUDA-graph metadata path rebuilds the page table(s)
and seqlen buffers with ~25 small aten ops per graph replay (index gathers,
floor_divide, cumsum, dtype casts, copies). On some host CPUs this is
~0.7-1.0 ms of pure dispatch, and it repeats several times per dec

vllm.title: Add Triton Backend for Unlimited-OCR R-SWA
vllm.author: andakai
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR adds explicit TritonAttention support for Unlimited-OCR's R-SWA decode
mask. The Triton path implements the mask with:
if USE_R_SWA:
    prefix_len = tl.load(rswa_prefix_lens_ptr + seq_idx)
    in_prefix = seq_offset[None, :] < prefix_len
    in_window = (query_abs_pos - seq_offset)

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] Fix batch chat endpoint corrupting logprobs when return_token_ids is set
vllm.author: fenghourun
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
The /v1/chat/completions/batch endpoint wired logprobs rendering to request.return_token_ids instead of return_tokens_as_token_ids. As a result, setting return_token_ids (which should only add a separate token_ids list) also silently rendered every logprob token as a "token_id:{id}" placehol

vllm.title: [Frontend] Refine the entrypoint class's inheritance hierarchy.
vllm.author: noooop

Purpose
The entrypoint class's inheritance hierarchy
├─BaseServing  <- Used to handle basic functions such as _is_model_supported, via OpenAIServingModels.
│  ├─GenerateBaseServing <-  Used to handle streaming output, as well as BeamSearch (via BeamSearchOnlineMixin).
│  │  ├─OpenAIServingChat
│  │

The vllm-openai release stage in docker/Dockerfile.cpu is FROM base, and n

vllm.title: [CI Bugfix] Lazily import Qwen warmup dependencies
vllm.author: LopezCastroRoberto
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Qwen warmup imported CUDA-touching FLA/Mamba helpers at module load time. Since gpu_worker -> kernel_warmup -> qwen_triton_warmup, this initialized CUDA before fork and broke engine tests: https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/75088#019f12dc-d9e0-48ce-a925-f64180ca7359
Fix: move those imports inside

It also bumps the MI355 examples timeout to reduce false failures on the longer examples suite. The KDA path includes a ROCm-specific Triton workaround that avoids num_stage

Signed-off-by: Bugen Zhao i@bugenzhao.com
Purpose
Rendering-parsing roundtrip tests now take a long time when running all unit tests in the Rust frontend, resulting in more than 20 seconds of wall time.
This PR speeds up roundtrip tests by...

reducing repeated tokenizer/backend setup via grouping t

vllm.title: [ROCm] Fix encoder-decoder cross-attention KV layout aliasing
vllm.author: djramic
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Encoder-decoder models (Whisper, Nemotron-Parse, ...) share one raw KV allocation between decoder self-attention (ROCM_ATTN, K/V-first) and cross-attention (AITER/TRITON, blocks-first). The mismatched stride conventions over the same bytes cause aliasing → garbage / repeated-token output.
Ch

vllm.title: [CI][AMD] Allow git operations on previously created work trees
vllm.author: tpopp
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The buildkite runs git checkout as root but the job command as a different user (e.g. buildkite-agent/uid=1001); git 2.35.2+ rejects the repo with "fatal: detected dubious ownership" unless the directory is explicitly allowed. This failure is specific to runs merging main and could not be reproduced

vllm.title: [AMD][EPLB] Enable EPLB for Quark OCP MXFP4 MoE
vllm.author: okorzh-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
QuarkOCP_MX_MoEMethod inherited supports_eplb=False, so enabling EPLB on Quark MXFP4 MoE models (e.g. Kimi-K2.6-MXFP4) raised NotImplementedError at init. The AITER weight shuffle (layout=(16,16)) only tiles the trailing two dims and keeps the expert dimension outermost, so EPLB's per-expert

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Multimodal] Normalize direct PIL image inputs
vllm.author: Sunt-ing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
vLLM normalizes image bytes from URL/base64/file inputs before they reach the model: JPEG EXIF orientation is applied to pixels and images are converted to the default RGB mode with transparency composited against the configured background.
The supported direct PIL.Image path used by offline

vllm.title: [GLM4V] Avoid GLM4V processor init during startup metadata reads
vllm.author: labAxiaoming
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
GLM4V startup budget paths only need processor metadata such as
processor_class and size.longest_edge, but they were initializing the full
HF processor via get_hf_processor(). This happens independently in
APIServer, EngineCore, and worker processes, adding startup latency and host
memory usage.
Rea

vllm.title: [Frontend] [Parser] Port DeepSeek V4 to streaming parser engine framework
vllm.author: bbrowning
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Replace the old DeepSeekV4ToolParser (V32 subclass) and DeepSeekV3ReasoningParser delegation with a unified ParserEngine subclass, matching the pattern used by Gemma4, Qwen3, MiniMax M2, and NemotronV3.
The new DeepSeekV4Parser implements the full DSML tool call format as a declarative state

vllm.title: [Frontend] Limit `SO_REUSEPORT` to multi-worker serving
vllm.author: BugenZhao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Only enable SO_REUSEPORT when the server socket is created for multiple API servers. In other words, the in-proc Python API server (hope it was not intentional) and the Rust frontend won't share a socket, avoiding confusion when multiple vLLM instances are launched on the same port.
Test Pla

Purpose
NVFP4 kv does not support --kv-cache-dtype-skip-layers sliding_window before this PR

[reverted] Remove the padding and scaling logic of kv cache in mamba
Update the kv cache scaling and padding logic in unify_kv_cache_spec_page_size. New logic:

Find the "primary" by smallest bytes per toke

vllm.title: [MRV2][SD] Make Dynamic SD comatible with Full Cuda Graphs
vllm.author: ekagra-ranjan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Followup to DSD: #32374 which ran only with MRv1 and Piecewise graph.
This PR mainly enables DSD with MRv2 + FCG. DSD + MRv1 is still on PW.
Currently, we capture FCG for decode only for given K say K=3 which meant only multiple of K+1=4 size of graph are captured. However, in DSD the chosen optimal

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI][Bugfix] Use VllmRunner for `voxtral_realtime` tests to avoid OOM on AMD GPU

vllm.bodyExcerpt:

On ROCm CI, test_voxtral_realtime.py fails with:
ValueError: Free memory on device cuda:0 (24.68/255.98 GiB) on startup is less than
desired GPU memory utilization (0.9, 230.39 GiB).

Root cause: The current engine and async_engine fixtures do not clean up GPU memory thoroughly enough betwee

vllm.title: [ROCm] Disable persistent sparse-MLA kernel for chunked-prefill continuations
vllm.author: Rohan138
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
[ROCm] Disable persistent sparse-MLA kernel for chunked-prefill continuations
Summary
Fixes #47042. GLM-4.6/4.5 / DeepSeek-V3.2-style sparse-MLA (DSA) models on ROCm
produce correct output up to ~20K tokens and then collapse into repetition /
garbage at longer contexts.
Root cause: the AITER persist

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix CPU split-KV scratchpad sizing
vllm.author: gausah01
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix a CPU split-KV hang seen with google/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it.
The worker could get stuck in reduce_splits waiting for a split completion flag. The root cause was the split-KV scratchpad was sized using the final output element size / smaller fallback q-head count, while the runtime split path
